name: M365 Email Security Baseline Configured
description: Ensures anti-phishing, Safe Links/Safe Attachments, and DMARC/DKIM/SPF protections are configured
query: SELECT id, policy_type, status, last_approved_date FROM policy_documents WHERE policy_type = 'm365_email_security' AND (status != 'approved' OR last_approved_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Enable anti-phishing, Safe Links, Safe Attachments, and enforce DMARC/DKIM/SPF for all domains. Review configurations annually.
